bead.title: Publish release binaries as GitHub Releases
bead.description: Upgrade .github/workflows/release-binaries.yml according to docs/release/release-infrastructure-plan.md. Current state: release-binaries.yml runs on v* tags and workflow_dispatch but only uploads a Linux x86_64 Actions artifact, with permissions contents: read. test.yml does not run on tags. Implement tag-triggered validation before publishing and create a real GitHub Release with binary, SHA256 checksum, and release notes. In-scope files: .github/workflows/release-binaries.yml, docs/release/* if needed, README links only if needed for release URLs. Out of scope: Docker image publishing, Helm chart publishing, microsite.
bead.acceptance:
1. `grep -q "softprops/action-gh-release" .github/workflows/release-binaries.yml` or equivalent GitHub Release creation action/API usage exists.
2. `grep -q "contents: write" .github/workflows/release-binaries.yml` passes.
3. The workflow contains a validation job that runs `cargo fmt --all -- --check`, `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings`, and `cargo test --workspace --all-targets` before release artifact publication.
4. The workflow packages `target/release/heimq` as `heimq-linux-x86_64` and writes a SHA256 checksum.
5. `cargo fmt --all -- --check` passes.
6. `cargo test --workspace --all-targets` passes.
